title: Helpers--Electricians
description: Help electricians by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Strip insulation from wire ends, using wire stripping pliers, and attach wires to terminals for subsequent soldering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trace out short circuits in wiring, using test meter.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure, cut, and bend wire and conduit, using measuring instruments and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine electrical units for loose connections and broken insulation and tighten connections, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain tools, vehicles, and equipment and keep parts and supplies in order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drill holes and pull or push wiring through openings, using hand and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work area and wash parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform semi-skilled and unskilled laboring duties related to the installation, maintenance and repair of a wide variety of electrical systems and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Thread conduit ends, connect couplings, and fabricate and secure conduit support brackets, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble defective electrical equipment, replace defective or worn parts, and reassemble equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct controllers and panels, using power drills, drill presses, taps, saws, and punches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport tools, materials, equipment, and supplies to work site by hand, handtruck, or heavy, motorized truck.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: String transmission lines or cables through ducts or conduits, under the ground, through equipment, or to towers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install copper-clad ground rods, using a manual post driver.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig trenches or holes for installation of conduit or supports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Raise, lower, or position equipment, tools, and materials, using hoist, hand line, or block and tackle.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt component parts together to form tower assemblies, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Erect electrical system components and barricades, and rig scaffolds, hoists, and shoring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim trees and clear undergrowth along right-of-way.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition materials, using warehouse requisition or release forms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Solder electrical connections, using soldering iron.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Paint a variety of objects related to electrical functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Break up concrete, using airhammer, to facilitate installation, construction, or repair of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate heavy equipment, such as backhoes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate cutting torches and welding equipment, while working with conduit and metal components to construct devices associated with electrical functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
